/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -fno-operator-names -fno-exceptions -Wall -Wextra -Wcast-align -Wchar-subscripts -Wformat-security -Wno-long-long -Wpointer-arith -Wundef -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Woverloaded-virtual -Werror=return-type -Werror=init-self -Werror=undef -Wvla -Wdate-time -Wsuggest-override -Wlogical-op -pedantic -Wzero-as-null-pointer-constant -Wmissing-include-dirs -g -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--fatal-warnings -Wl,--enable-new-dtags  -shared  -o ../../../bin/lingmo/kcms/kcm_about-distro.so "CMakeFiles/kcm_about-distro.dir/kcm_about-distro_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kcm_about-distro.dir/CPUEntry.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kcm_about-distro.dir/Entry.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kcm_about-distro.dir/FancyString.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kcm_about-distro.dir/GPUEntry.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kcm_about-distro.dir/GraphicsPlatformEntry.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kcm_about-distro.dir/KernelEntry.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kcm_about-distro.dir/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kcm_about-distro.dir/MemoryEntry.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kcm_about-distro.dir/OSVersionEntry.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kcm_about-distro.dir/LingmoEntry.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kcm_about-distro.dir/ServiceRunner.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kcm_about-distro.dir/ThirdPartyEntry.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kcm_about-distro.dir/qrc_kcm_about-distro.cpp.o"  /usr/lib/libKF6KCMUtilsQuick.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libKF6KIOGui.so.6.4.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.7.2 /usr/lib/libQt6QmlBuiltins.a /usr/lib/libKF6KCMUtilsCore.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libKF6Solid.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libKF6KIOCore.so.6.4.1 /usr/lib/libKF6I18n.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libKF6Service.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libKF6ConfigCore.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libKF6AuthCore.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libKF6CoreAddons.so.6.4.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.7.2 /usr/lib/libQt6DBus.so.6.7.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.7.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.7.2 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
